## Summary
This PR introduces a pull request template and a personal self-review checklist to improve PR quality and consistency.

## Changes
- Added `.github/pull_request_template.md`
- Added `docs/pr-checklist.md`
- Updated `README.md` with instructions on how to run PR 5

## Why This Change
The template helps contributors provide clear PR descriptions, while the checklist ensures code is reviewed before submission.

## Testing
- Verified that the PR template loads automatically when creating a new pull request.
- Confirmed documentation formatting is correct.

## Checklist
- [x] Files added to correct directories
- [x] Documentation reviewed
- [x] Markdown formatting verified
